title: juncus supinus var. repens
intro: Juncus supinus var. repens, also known as creeping rush or creeping juncus, is a type of plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Juncus supinus var. repens include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce swelling, and act as a natural diuretic to aid in the elimination of excess fluids. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
